title: PlanAuditor Adversarial Detection
description: Validates PlanAuditor can detect deliberately planted flaws in a multi-phase plan

inputs.label: circular-dependency
inputs.description: Plan where Phase 3 depends on Phase 5 and Phase 5 depends on Phase 3

input.plan_summary: 5-phase plan with hidden circular dependency between Phase 3 and Phase 5

inputs.label: file-collision-in-wave
inputs.description: Two phases in the same wave both modify Orchestrator.agent.md

input.plan_summary: 4-phase plan where Phase 1 (Wave 1) and Phase 2 (Wave 1) both modify Orchestrator.agent.md

inputs.label: missing-tests
inputs.description: Phase 4 creates new schema but declares no tests or acceptance criteria

input.plan_summary: 3-phase plan where Phase 2 creates a new JSON schema with no validation tests

inputs.label: destructive-without-rollback
inputs.description: Plan includes bulk schema rewrite with no rollback strategy

input.plan_summary: 6-phase plan that rewrites 7 JSON schemas in one phase with no incremental migration

inputs.label: security-untrusted-input
inputs.description: Plan parses user-supplied binary files without input validation step

input.plan_summary: 4-phase plan that adds binary file parsing without input validation or bounds checking

inputs.label: unbounded-large-table-query
inputs.description: Plan adds a query over a 2M-row table with no pagination, no index reference, and no performance acceptance criteria

input.plan_summary: 3-phase plan that adds a GET /adjustments endpoint fetching all rows from forecast_adjustments (2M rows) with no LIMIT, no pagination, and no index strategy. Acceptance criteria contain no latency or throughput targets.

assertions: Each planted flaw appears in findings with correct category
Severity is at least the expected minimum
Status is never APPROVED when CRITICAL flaws are present
Each finding has a non-empty suggested_fix
PlanAuditor detects missing pagination on large-table queries as a performance MAJOR or CRITICAL finding
audit_scope.covered_dimensions includes performance when focus_areas includes performance
